name: INNOVATIVE FOOD HOLDINGS INC
summary: Innovative Food Holdings, Inc. (IVFH) distributes specialty and perishable food products including origin-specific seafood, domestic and imported meats, exotic game, artisanal cheeses, caviar, mushrooms, micro-greens, and organic ingredients. The company serves Professional Chefs at restaurants, hotels, casinos, hospitals, and national chains via direct delivery, e-commerce on Amazon and its own website, and drop-ship through broadline distributors like US Foods. Operations are supported by warehouses in Chicago and Denver.
